title: AI Governance Configuration
description: Schema for .ai-governance/config.yaml — the central configuration file for AI code governance.

preset.description: Team size preset. Determines default gate thresholds and cross-verification intensity.

release_mode.description: Current release mode. NORMAL: full gates. SAFE: stricter thresholds. EMERGENCY: bypass with post-eval.

gates.description: Release gate configurations. Each gate acts as a quality checkpoint.

gate_1_config.description: Gate 1: Static Analysis — automated checks run before push or on PR.

checks.description: List of CLI commands to execute as static checks.

required.description: If true, gate failure blocks the release.

gate_2_config.description: Gate 2: Confidence Score — AI-generated confidence evaluation against golden set.

golden_set_path.description: Path to the golden test set directory, relative to project root.

thresholds_file.description: Path to domain-specific confidence thresholds file.

gate_3_config.description: Gate 3: Cross-Verification — multi-agent review of AI-generated code.

mode.description: When to trigger cross-verification. always: every change. sampling: random percentage. auto: risk-based.

sampling_rate.description: Probability of triggering cross-verification when mode is 'sampling'. Range: 0.0 to 1.0.

cross_verification_config.description: Cross-verification settings for multi-agent code review.

rounds.description: Number of verification rounds. More rounds = higher confidence but slower.

leader.description: Leader/Judge model configuration for Round 3 independent judgment.

worker.description: Worker agent model configuration for Round 1-2 analysis.

context.description: Project context injection settings. Controls what project files are provided to agents for context-aware analysis.

level.description: Context detail level. none: no context (backward compatible). minimal: CLAUDE.md only. standard: rules + coding standards + agent-specific docs. full: everything including INTENT.md, FIXME.md.

extra_files.description: Additional files to include as context, relative to project root.

max_chars_per_agent.description: Maximum context characters per agent. Controls token budget for context injection.

escape_hatch_config.description: Emergency bypass configuration. Allows skipping gates under strict conditions.

emergency_approvers.description: Minimum number of human approvers required for emergency bypass.

post_eval_deadline_hours.description: Hours after emergency bypass within which a full post-evaluation must be completed.

max_consecutive_bypasses.description: Maximum consecutive emergency bypasses before mandatory full review.

observability_config.description: Observability and monitoring settings for governance metrics.

enabled.description: Enable governance observability dashboard and metrics collection.

drift_detection.description: Detect when AI-generated code drifts from established patterns.

feedback_loop.description: Enable feedback loop to improve confidence scores over time.
